text: Could you repeat that, please?
What does that mean?

Let me think for a moment.
That is a good question.

Routine

Marc arrives at the Santo André office. Gleice welcomes him and introduces her team. She talks about her routine and her projects. Marc asks questions about the projects. They plan the next steps together.
Welcome to Sanofi Medley!
I am the commercial excellence manager.
My team has five people.
I always review my schedule in the morning.
What projects do you work on?
I work at Sanofi Medley.
She works in logistics.
What do you do?
What is your role at Sanofi?
Welcome to Sanofi Medley.
Can I ask you a question?
I am Gleice. I am from Santo André, Brazil.
Our department works with strategy.
His name is Daniel. He is a supply manager.
I usually have three meetings every day.
I never skip my morning coffee.
Where do you work?

Hello Gleice, this is Marc, from Sanofi France. I visit the Santo André office on Monday. I want to meet you and your team, and learn about your projects. My day is free after ten o'clock. See you soon!

Good morning, everyone. My name is Ana. I am from São Paulo, Brazil. I work at a pharmaceutical company. I am a logistics manager. My team has eight people. I always start my day with a team meeting, and I usually have many calls in the afternoon. I love my job because I like to connect with people.
Good morning! I am Marc, from Sanofi France. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you, Marc! I am Gleice. Welcome to Santo André.
Thank you! So, what is your role here?
I am the commercial excellence manager. I work with strategy and performance.
Excellent. And how is your team?
My team is great. We have five people in our department.
What does a normal day look like for you?
I always review my schedule in the morning. I usually have three meetings every day.
Busy days! Can I ask you a question about the transformation project?
Of course! What do you want to know?
What projects do you work on this year?
We work on digital transformation and team performance. Come, I can show you everything.
